title: Sum of even numbers
prompt: Write sum_even(numbers) that returns the sum of the even integers in a list.

help.plain: Walk through the list and total only the even numbers, ignoring the rest.
help.analogy: Like counting only the red M&Ms in a bag — you look at each one, skip the others, and tally the reds.
help.mnemonic: LEA — Loop, Examine, Add. Loop over the list, Examine each item, Add it only if it qualifies.
help.nudge: How do you test one number for even? You already built that idea with `%`.

example.problem: Sum the ODD numbers in a list (a different task).
example.note: Same shape as your task — loop, test each item, add when it matches. Yours tests for even (`n % 2 == 0`) instead of odd.
